name: meok-eu-code-of-practice-mcp — EU-AI-ACT FAQ
description: Frequently asked questions about EU-AI-ACT on meok-eu-code-of-practice-mcp

mainEntity.name: What is the EU AI Act Article 50 deadline?
Do I need an EU AI Act audit?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your AI system is used in the EU or affects EU citizens, yes — high-risk systems need Article 22 obligations.
Free tier: 3 keystone certs per day. Pro tier: £199/mo unlimited. Enterprise: £1,499/mo white-label.

mainEntity.name: How long does an audit take?

acceptedAnswer.text: The signed keystone cert is generated in 5 seconds. The full 48h Assessment is £4,950 one-time.
Yes — the Ed25519 signature lets your auditor verify without contacting MEOK.
13 frameworks: EU AI Act, DORA, NIS2, CRA, GDPR, ISO 42001, ISO 27001, SOC 2, PCI DSS, NIST AI RMF, HIPAA, Care-membrane, Proofof.
Yes — MIT-licensed, substrate auditable on GitHub, Ed25519-signed.
